routines.name: Pre-Market Research
routines.prompt: You are the Pre-Market Research agent. Read CLAUDE.md and config.py for context. Determine today's ET date and create journal/<DATE>.md from journal/template.md if it does not exist. Run `python scripts/research_agent.py news` to pull overnight headlines. Classify the market regime: `python -c "from scripts.strategies import market_regime; from scripts import research; import json; bars = research.get_bars('SPY', timeframe='1Day', limit=120); print(json.dumps(market_regime.classify(bars), indent=2))"`. Note the regime and key SPY/QQQ/index levels in the Portfolio Status / Market Research sections. Run `python scripts/research_agent.py backtest-all` ONLY if more than 7 days have passed since models/backtest_results.json was last updated (check the updated_at field). Reset models/opening_ranges.json to {"date": "<TODAY>", "ranges": {}}. Update heartbeat.json (last_routine: 'Pre-Market Research', status: 'ok'). Commit + push the journal and refreshed models JSON.

routines.name: Intraday Monitor
routines.prompt: You are the Intraday Monitor agent. Start the trading loop: `python scripts/intraday_monitor.py`. The process runs until 4:00 PM ET, polling every 60 seconds. Do not exit early. The kill switch (config.MAX_DAILY_LOSS_PCT, 3% drawdown) is checked at the top of every iteration — if it engages, no new trades will be placed and `python scripts/kill_switch.py close-all` will flatten open positions. Every iteration appends to intraday_log/<DATE>.jsonl. After the loop exits (post 16:00 ET), commit + push the journal, intraday_log files, models/ updates, and heartbeat.

routines.name: End of Day Analysis
routines.prompt: You are the End-of-Day Analysis agent. Read CLAUDE.md. Determine today's ET date. Run `python scripts/research.py account` and `python scripts/research.py positions` for final-of-day numbers. Read journal/<DATE>.md and the intraday_log/<DATE>.jsonl. Compute today's realized + unrealized P&L vs the start-of-day equity. For every signal that produced a closed trade today, call `signal_engine.update_accuracy_tracker(symbol, strategy, signal, outcome, pnl_pct)` to record WIN/LOSS — this feeds tomorrow's strategy weights. Write the journal's End-of-Day Reflection (one substantive paragraph) plus a strategy performance table summarizing wins/losses by strategy. Set `Tomorrow watch:` with 2-4 levels/catalysts. Run `python scripts/notify.py journal/<DATE>.md` to send the digest. Commit + push.

routines.name: Weekend Research
routines.prompt: You are the Weekend Research agent. Read CLAUDE.md. Run `python scripts/research_agent.py news` to pull strategy-research headlines into research/strategy_notes.md. Identify the two lowest-performing strategies from models/accuracy_tracker.json (lowest win rate with at least config.ACCURACY_MIN_TRADES trades) and run `python scripts/research_agent.py tune --strategy <NAME> --symbol SPY` for each of them. Then run `python scripts/research_agent.py backtest-all` to refresh models/backtest_results.json. Finally `python scripts/research_agent.py weekly` to write research/weekly_report_<DATE>.md. Update models/optimized_params.json with any improved params found. Commit + push everything.
